data[0]  = 32'b111111111111_00000_000_00001_0010011; // addi x1, x0, -1
data[1]  = 32'b000000000000_00001_010_00010_0010011; // slti  x2, x1, 0
data[2]  = 32'b000000000000_00001_011_00011_0010011; // sltiu x3, x1, 0
data[3]  = 32'b011111111111_00001_100_00100_0010011; // xori  x4, x1, 0x7ff
data[4]  = 32'b100000000000_00000_110_00101_0010011; // ori   x5, x0, -2048
data[5]  = 32'b000000111100_00001_111_00110_0010011; // andi  x6, x1, 0x0f0
data[6]  = 32'b000000000001_00000_000_00111_0010011; // addi  x7, x0, 1
data[7]  = 32'b0000000_11111_00111_001_01000_0010011; // slli  x8, x7, 31
data[8]  = 32'b0000000_11111_01000_101_01001_0010011; // srli  x9, x8, 31
data[9]  = 32'b0100000_11111_01000_101_01010_0010011; // srai  x10, x8, 31
data[10] = 32'b011111111111_00000_000_01011_0010011; // addi  x11, x0, 2047
data[11] = 32'b100000000000_00000_000_01100_0010011; // addi  x12, x0, -2048

data[12] = 32'b0000100_00010_00000_010_00000_0100011; // sw x2, 128(x0)
data[13] = 32'b0000100_00011_00000_010_00100_0100011; // sw x3, 132(x0)
data[14] = 32'b0000100_00100_00000_010_01000_0100011; // sw x4, 136(x0)
data[15] = 32'b0000100_00101_00000_010_01100_0100011; // sw x5, 140(x0)
data[16] = 32'b0000100_00110_00000_010_10000_0100011; // sw x6, 144(x0)
data[17] = 32'b0000100_01000_00000_010_10100_0100011; // sw x8, 148(x0)
data[18] = 32'b0000100_01001_00000_010_11000_0100011; // sw x9, 152(x0)
data[19] = 32'b0000100_01010_00000_010_11100_0100011; // sw x10, 156(x0)
data[20] = 32'b0000101_01011_00000_010_00000_0100011; // sw x11, 160(x0)
data[21] = 32'b0000101_01100_00000_010_00100_0100011; // sw x12, 164(x0)
